title: Tender Spicy Croatian Pork Stir Fry
description: A spicy and nostalgic Croatian dish featuring tender pork, cornstarch, and stir-fry techniques, friendly to ayurvedic tamasic diets. This recipe combines the flavors of Croatia with a touch of spice.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the pork strips and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
In a small bowl, whisk together the cornstarch, paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cornstarch mixture to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Return the pork to the skillet and stir to coat with the cornstarch mixture.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
